info.hindI_arTa: denA yajYa karanA KAnA lenA BakzaRa karanA grahaRa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' dAnAdAnayoH ' ityeke  dAnamatra ' codita ADAre haviHprakzepaH ' iti mADavaH  ' jIvaDAtO prARasyeva atrApi dAne havizo antarBAvAt akarmakatvam kecidaNgIcakruH  ' tftIyA ca hoSCandasi ' (2.3.3) ityatra BAzye tu ' juhotiH prakzepe vartate ' ityuktam  evaM ca yavAgUM juhoti ityAdayaH sakarmakAH prayogAH upapadyante  ' agnizu hUyamAnezu ' ityAdizu prIRanArTakatvamapi BAzyasammatam

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prahuto BOtiko baliH' (manu0 374) prahuta iti BUtabaleH saMjYAntaraM munyantarakftam
'ava sma yasya vezaRe svedaM paTizu juhvati' (f0 575) avajuhvati aDomuKaM juhvati
'jinvanti viSve taM devA yo brAhmaRa fzaBamAjuhoti' (aTarva0 9418) ANarTe viSezakfnna
'tasmA indrAya sutamAjuhomi' (tE0 brA0 1115) Ajuhomi sarvato juhomi
'aTopaviSya mfdamaBijuhoti' (Sa0 brA0 63315) mfda upari havyaM pradiSatItyarTaH
'aTa yadADigacCet pratijuhuyAt' (go0 gf0 1922) sAyamAdikAlaM pratIkzya juhuyAdityarTaH
